. Major Equipment MISSION Creating academic excellence through advanced teaching learning process. Developing scientific and technical knowledge of students to ensure their engagement in academics, innovation and research. Offering platforms to enhance analytical, logical, soft and communicative skills for developing their overall personality. Inculcating ethical values and to promote social responsibility through behavioral training programs

. All Rights Reserved. R.Suresh M.Sc. M.Phil, Ph.D, SET D.O.J : 09.06.2008 Areas of Specialization Materials Science, Nano Science R

. All Rights Reserved. R.Suresh M.Sc. M.Phil, Ph.D, SET D.O.J : 09.06.2008 Areas of Specialization Materials Science, Nano Science R. Suresh has his foundational studies with a B.Sc. from Madras University and an M.Sc. from Annamalai University which laid the groundwork for his academic background. Further, he has completed his M.Phil at College of Engineering, Guindy, Anna University in 1994 and Ph.D in 2018 besides completing State Eligible Test (SET) for Lectureship in 2016. His research articles in nanoscience and nanotechnology is particularly relevant in today’s scientific landscape. Additionally, his role as a reviewer for Springer showcases his expertise and involvement in the academic community

. Additionally, his role as a reviewer for Springer showcases his expertise and involvement in the academic community. With over 26 years of teaching experience across various roles and institutions, has developed an extensive background which includes curriculum development, mentorship, and variety of teaching strategies, contributing significantly to the academic growth of his students. With multiple authored books on topics like Materials Science, Engineering Physics, and Semiconductor Physics, along with lab manuals, he has contributed significantly to educational resources in his field. His works not only contributes to academic literature but also serves as a resource for students and professionals in engineering and physical sciences

. Being a life member of ISTE also reflects his commitment to the professional development of engineering educators. Dr.B.Yogeswari MSc.,M.Phil.,PGDCA.,PhD D.O.J : 01.08.2013 Areas of Specialization Molecular Quantum Mechanics Dr. B. Yogeswari M.Sc., M.Phil., Ph.D., PGDCA., is being associated with Sri Eshwar College of Engineering, Coimbatore as Professor of Physics right from 2013. Encompassing two decades of teaching and research experience and with her impeccable enthusiasm, Yogeswari is a passionate educationalist who believes that teaching is a noble profession which shapes the character, caliber, and future of the young individuals

. Apart from engineering, Yogeswari boasts almost 10 years of arts and science college experience where she has demonstrated his managerial adeptness and commitment to academic excellence throughout her tenure all the way through various departmental roles and responsibilities. As a well-respected and erudite scholar, Yogeswari has been unreservedly educated by Nallamuthu Gounder Mahalingam college, Pollachi holding gold medals during her UG and PG programmes. Her scholastic contour has been expanded with a doctoral degree from Bharathiar University, Coimbatore in 2014. Being a recognized research supervisor in Anna University for PhD., and Bharathiar University for M.Phil., she echoes her dedication to intellectual quest and contributing to the academic fraternity

. In her research acclaim, she has 17 research publications in well renowned international journals along with a book publication as an associate editor, and 2 patents and acting as reviewer for various reputed journals. She has completed a research seminar funded by Tamil Nadu State Council for Science and Technology (TNSCST), Tamilnadu and a research project through Sri Eshwar institutional seed fund of Rs. 1,00,000/-. She is always fascinated in consistently improving upon her existing knowledge and skill sets through various online courses and faculty development programmes. Dr.N.Krishnamoorthy M.Sc., M.Phil., Ph.D D.O.J : 27.09.2021 Areas of Specialization Environmental radioactivity, spectroscopy, nanotechnology Dr. N

. Dr.N.Krishnamoorthy M.Sc., M.Phil., Ph.D D.O.J : 27.09.2021 Areas of Specialization Environmental radioactivity, spectroscopy, nanotechnology Dr. N. Krishnamoorthy is a highly qualified individual with a robust academic background in Physics. He obtained his B.Sc. in Physics from AVVM Sri Pushpam College, Tanjavur in 1998, followed by an M.Sc. in Physics from Sri Ramakrishna Mission Vidhyalaya College of Arts and Science, Coimbatore in 2000. Continuing his academic journey, Dr. Krishnamoorthy completed an M.Phil. in Physics from Annamalai University, Annamalainagar in 2002, and achieved a Ph.D. in Physics from Bharathiar University, Coimbatore in 2015

. in Physics from Annamalai University, Annamalainagar in 2002, and achieved a Ph.D. in Physics from Bharathiar University, Coimbatore in 2015. With over 23 years of teaching experience, he currently holds the position of Associate Professor in the Department of Physics at Sri Eshwar College of Engineering, Coimbatore. He has a notable publication record, with approximately 20 research articles in various National and International peer-reviewed journals, along with a couple of patent publications. He is also recognized as an approved research supervisor under Anna University, Chennai, overseeing the research programs of two candidates. His research interests span across environmental radioactivity, nanoparticle synthesis, and thin films

. His research interests span across environmental radioactivity, nanoparticle synthesis, and thin films. Dr.B.Selvakumar M.Sc., Ph.D D.O.J : 04.07.2022 Areas of Specialization Solar Desalination, Nanomaterials Dr. B. Selvakumar is an ambitious and committed educator who firmly believes in guiding students through the learning process and helping them develop both academically and in the area of life skills enrichment. He has managed over 15 technical and non-technical courses during his more than 20 years of teaching, research, and administrative experience. Utilising solar energy and synthesising nanomaterials are his areas of expertise. consistently conducting research, having published more than 34 articles, 25 of which were in international peer-reviewed publications

. consistently conducting research, having published more than 34 articles, 25 of which were in international peer-reviewed publications. At Kalasalingam University in Srivilliputtur, Dr. Selvakumar occupied a number of administrative positions. He held the positions of HEAD, Department of Physics, School of Advanced Sciences, Assistant Director, OL Programmes, CDOE and Accreditation Team Member at Kalasalingam University. Presently, he is a member of the IQAC Core Team, overseeing the NAAC documentation and the Accreditation & Ranking vertical. Dr. Selvakumar is employed by numerous institutions as an academic auditor, a member of the board of studies, an external examiner for doctoral candidates and an external member of doctoral committees

. In addition, he reviews manuscripts for a number of international journals and provides subject matter expertise to outside committees. Dr.A.Sivakami M.Sc., M.Phil., Ph.D D.O.J : 03.05.2023 Areas of Specialization Nanomaterials: Electrochemical sensors, Supercapacitors, DSSCs & LDSS Dr. A. Sivakami is currently working as an Associate Professor in the Department of Physics at Sri Eshwar College of Engineering since May 2023. She has over 11 years of teaching experience, having served in various academic positions including Lecturer, Assistant Professor, and Associate Professor. In addition, she has six years of full-time research experience from 2008 to 2014. She received her Ph.D. in Physics from Anna University, Chennai, in 2015

. She received her Ph.D. in Physics from Anna University, Chennai, in 2015. Her research interests include solar cells, low-dimensional semiconducting systems, electrochemical sensors, and supercapacitors. She was awarded the DST-JRF (2008–2009) and CSIR-SRF (2010–2013) fellowships in support of her research work. Dr. Sivakami has published more than 23 papers in SCI/WoS- and Scopus-indexed journals, authored one book, contributed seven book chapters, and filed five patents. She is a life member of the Magnetic Society of India (MSI). She has submitted core research proposals to various funding agencies, including DST-ANRF, N-PDF, and TNSCST. She has also been invited as a resource person to deliver lectures on career opportunities for physics graduates and on quantum computing. Dr

. She has also been invited as a resource person to deliver lectures on career opportunities for physics graduates and on quantum computing. Dr. Sivakami regularly serves as a reviewer for reputed journals from Elsevier (such as Journal of Molecular Structure, Materials Today: Proceedings, Obesity Medicine, Internet of Things), Springer (including Topics in Catalysis, Journal of Materials Science: Materials in Electronics, Journal of Materials Science), and RSC Advances.She was recognized as a research supervisor by Anna University, Chennai, in 2016, and is currently guiding one full- time research scholar in the field of supercapacitors. In her previous institutions, she has held key roles including NBA/NAAC Coordinator, Institution Innovation Cell Convener, and AISHE Nodal Officer

. In her previous institutions, she has held key roles including NBA/NAAC Coordinator, Institution Innovation Cell Convener, and AISHE Nodal Officer. Dr.R.Kayalvizhi M.Sc., M.Phil., Ph.D D.O.J : 14.10.2024 Areas of Specialization Organic Chemistry, Physical Chemistry Dr. R. Kayalvizhi is an accomplished chemist, researcher, and academic leader with over 14 years of experience in higher education. She earned her Ph.D. in Chemistry from Bharathiar University in 2018, specializing in Synthetic Organic Chemistry and Stereochemistry. She also holds M.Phil., M.Sc., and B.Sc. degrees in Chemistry, demonstrating a strong academic foundation and consistent academic excellence

. She also holds M.Phil., M.Sc., and B.Sc. degrees in Chemistry, demonstrating a strong academic foundation and consistent academic excellence. Her research expertise includes synthetic organic chemistry, stereochemistry, green chemistry, nanomaterials, and polymer science. She has contributed to structural chemistry through X-ray crystallography and molecular structure analysis. Dr. Kayalvizhi has published several peer-reviewed articles in reputed international journals such as Journal of Molecular Structure, Acta Crystallographica Section E, International Journal of Applied Pharmaceutics, Biomass Conversion and Biorefinery, and Journal of Inorganic and Organometallic Polymers and Materials

. Her work emphasizes sustainable synthesis, green methodologies, and nanocomposite development for environmental remediation. In addition to research, she has actively participated in national and international conferences and completed Faculty Development Programs in emerging fields such as nanomedicine, hydrogen energy technologies, and green materials. She has guided over 30 postgraduate students and one M.Phil. scholar in research projects, reflecting her strong commitment to mentorship. Dr. Kayalvizhi also contributes to institutional development as Innovation Cell Coordinator for First-Year students and Academic Coordinator for Science & Humanities

. Her career demonstrates a balanced integration of teaching excellence, research productivity, academic leadership, and dedication to sustainable and interdisciplinary scientific advancement. Dr.V.Arul M.Sc., Ph.D D.O.J : 01.09.2022 Areas of Specialization Nanochemistry, Material Science, Catalysis, Bio-imaging, Electrochemistry, Energy Storage Dr. V. Arul is a dedicated materials scientist and academic leader with extensive experience in advanced functional nanomaterials for environmental, biomedical, and energy applications. He received his M.Sc. (2011) and Ph.D. (2020) from The Gandhigram Rural Institute (Deemed to be University). With over 7 years of teaching experience and 12 years of research experience , Dr. Arul has built a strong academic and research portfolio

. With over 7 years of teaching experience and 12 years of research experience , Dr. Arul has built a strong academic and research portfolio. He has authored 25+ SCI-indexed publications in reputed international journals, contributed three book chapters in the Springer book series , and holds four patents (three in 2024 and one in 2025), reflecting his consistent innovation and research productivity. His core research focuses on the synthesis of highly fluorescent carbon dots an eco-friendly catalyst for environmental remediation, through detoxification industrial waste water from organic dyes and pollutants. He has also explored their fluorescent staining capabilities for cancer cell detection through bio-imaging applications , bridging materials science with biomedical research

. Currently, his research extends to the design and development of luminescent sensors for biomolecules, metal ions, and small molecules, emphasizing high sensitivity and selectivity. In addition, he is actively working on energy storage and conversion technologies , including supercapacitors and electrocatalytic water splitting (HER and OER) , utilizing green carbon quantum dots and metal-based nanocomposites. Beyond research, Dr. Arul plays significant academic administrative roles at SECE. He presently serves as the Institute-level IQAC Coordinator for Research, Extension & Outreach and as an Internal Auditor , supporting institutional quality initiatives and NAAC/NBA accreditation processes

. Since June 2025, he has also taken on additional leadership responsibilities as the Overall Event In-charge, ERP Coordinator, and Department Research Head , contributing strategically to academic excellence and institutional development. Dr. Arul’s work reflects a strong commitment to sustainable materials innovation, interdisciplinary collaboration, and academic leadership aligned with global scientific and societal needs. Dr.D.Thillaikkarasi M.Sc.M.phil.Ph.D., PGDCA D.O.J : 03.08.2024 Areas of Specialization Material science applications of super capacitor Dr. D. Thillaikkarasi is a distinguished academician, researcher, and sustainability advocate with over 11 years of teaching experience in engineering chemistry, materials science, and renewable energy

. She has consistently demonstrated academic excellence, producing cent-percent results and mentoring high-achieving students who excel in both academics and innovation-driven initiatives. Her research expertise lies in materials science, supercapacitor technology, activated carbon applications, and environmental sustainability . She has published extensively in reputed peer-reviewed journals, particularly in the domains of advanced carbon materials and energy storage systems. Her work has significantly contributed to the development of sustainable materials for high-performance applications. Dr

. Her work has significantly contributed to the development of sustainable materials for high-performance applications. Dr. Thillaikkarasi brings 1.5 years of industrial experience in environmental and energy auditing, where she effectively applied scientific principles to enhance sustainability, operational efficiency, and environmental compliance in industrial settings. She is a Certified Chemical Auditor , accredited by Zumeru and Bureau Veritas, demonstrating her professional competence in industrial audit practices. She was a recipient of CSIR/DRDO research funding for presenting her research at the National Conference on Environmental Science and Nanotechnology (2012), reflecting her strong academic and research foundation

. Her commitment to sustainability and societal impact earned her the IGEN Sustainability Champion Award from the IGEN Community, Indian Institute of Technology Madras. Research Collaborations & Academic Engagements Dr. Thillaikkarasi has established international and national research collaborations, including: National Kaohsiung University of Science and Technology – Collaboration with the Institute of Aquatic Science and Technology and College of Hydrosphere Science for research on activated carbon applications in adsorption technologies. Dr. M.G.R. Educational and Research Institute – Joint research initiatives on supercapacitors development using various carbon sources. These collaborations underscore her global research engagement and interdisciplinary approach

. These collaborations underscore her global research engagement and interdisciplinary approach. Innovation, Sustainability & Social Impact Dr. Thillaikkarasi is deeply committed to sustainability-oriented education and societal development. She has: Mentored sustainability-driven projects such as shore energy initiatives . Guided student-led projects addressing public problem statements through Design Thinking methodologies , transforming them into scalable, user-centred products accessible to diverse communities. Led innovative initiatives focusing on societal inclusion , including app-based solutions supporting transgender medical assistance and community welfare

. Actively promotes student entrepreneurship by mentoring emerging application development projects aimed at empowering the student community to become socially responsible innovators and entrepreneurs. Teaching & Mentorship Excellence An inspiring educator and effective communicator, integrates theoretical depth with real-world applications in her teaching methodology. Her mentoring approach fosters creativity, research aptitude, sustainability awareness, and entrepreneurial thinking among students. Her ability to secure research funding, collaborate internationally, contribute to industrial sustainability, and nurture innovation-driven student projects highlights her commitment to impactful research, transformative education, and societal advancement

. She continues to be a valuable asset in academia and industry, contributing meaningfully to sustainable technology development, student empowerment, and global research excellence. Dr.R.Sivagurusundar MSc.Ph.D. NET, GATE, IIPP (Taiwan) Areas of Specialization Physical chemistry, environmental chemistry,water research Dr. R. Sivagurusundar is an emerging researcher in materials science with specialized expertise in advanced nanocomposite materials for environmental and energy applications. He earned his Master’s degree from The Gandhigram Rural Institute (DTBU) in 2018 and completed his Ph.D. at Manonmaniam Sundaranar University in 2025. During his academic journey, he undertook the prestigious IIPP Internship at Ming Chi University of Technology, expanding his global research exposure

. He qualified the CSIR–UGC NET examination (June 2020), securing an impressive 20th rank at the national level , and also cleared GATE 2022 with an 81.1 percentile , demonstrating strong academic excellence. With over 5 years of teaching experience and 4 years of dedicated research experience , Dr. Sivagurusundar has established a solid foundation in materials research. He has authored 8+ SCI-indexed publications in reputed international journals, contributed two book chapters in distinguished Springer and RSC book series , and holds one published patent (2025) . His research primarily focuses on the design and development of advanced ternary nanocomposite photocatalysts for the efficient degradation of organic pollutants

. Currently, his work extends toward energy-oriented applications of ternary nanocomposites , with a growing emphasis on carbon-based nanocomposites for high-performance energy storage systems . Driven by innovation and interdisciplinary collaboration, Dr. Sivagurusundar continues to contribute to sustainable materials development aimed at addressing global environmental and energy challenges. Dr.N.Kavitha M.A.,B.Ed.,M.Phil.,Ph.D., D.O.J : 27.09.2021 Areas of Specialization American Literature, ELT Dr. Kavitha holds the position of Associate Professor of English at Sri Eshwar College of Engineering, Coimbatore, boasting over two decades of combined teaching experience in Arts and Engineering institutions

. Her academic journey includes a Bachelor’s degree in English Literature from GVG Visalakshi College for Women, a Master’s degree in English Literature from Palaniandavar College for Arts and Culture, Palani, an M.Phil. from Gandhigram Deemed University, Dindigul, and a Ph.D. from Government Arts College, Coimbatore, affiliated with Bharathiar University, Coimbatore. Dr. Kavitha has contributed significantly to academia, with over 15 published papers in esteemed scholarly journals. Her research spans a wide spectrum, encompassing Indian, American, and Canadian Literature, along with explorations in Feminist and Cultural studies

. Her research spans a wide spectrum, encompassing Indian, American, and Canadian Literature, along with explorations in Feminist and Cultural studies. Additionally, she has authored three instructional books tailored for engineering students, titled “Technical English,” “Professional English II,” and “Tamils and Technology.” As the Principal Investigator for the MSME-3.0 project, valued at 12.54 Lakhs INR, titled ‘Mobile Learning Centres for Rural Women,’ Dr. N. Kavitha exemplifies her commitment to community-driven research initiatives. Actively engaged within the academic community, she has presented her research findings at numerous conferences and seminars. Recognized for her expertise, Dr

.
